articles.title: Cebu-based university opens first-of-its-kind esports hub
articles.description: CEBU CITY, Philippines — The Cebu Institute of Technology-University (CIT-U) opened the Wildcats PlayLab, a first-of-its-kind esports hub in Visayas, on April 17, 2026. The university is a member-school of the Cebu Schools Athletic Foundation, Inc. (CESAFI), and hosted the inaugural season of the CESAFI Esports League (CEL), Cebu’s leading collegiate esports competition. The Wildcats PlayLab is dedicated to esports competitions, esports broadcast production, and content creation. A concept proposed by students The concept of the Wildcats PlayLab began during the inaugural season of the CEL, when the university was hosting the league. It was proposed by CEL student volunteers [...]... Keep on reading: Cebu-based university opens first-of-its-kind esports hub
